title: athlete-guardian — helper functions
description: Ergonomic helpers for resolving primary guardian, checking guardianship status, resolving pickup roster + medical authorisation.

helpers.purpose: Returns the active primary guardian for an athlete, or null when none exists. Cache-hot.
Returns all guardians for an athlete. active_only=true (default) filters to is_active=true.
Returns all guardianships held by a User. Feeds /me/guardianships.
True when the User has an active guardianship on the athlete. Used by the .own scope + the athlete-consent rule.

True when the User has an active guardianship on the athlete with can_authorise_medical_care=true AND has_legal_custody=true AND verification_status='verified'. Used by Wave 4+ Medical Clearance workflow.
True when the User has an active guardianship with can_pickup=true. Reception staff check this on session dismissal.
True when the User has an active + verified guardianship with has_legal_custody=true on the athlete. Used by athlete::consent_recorded_by_authorised_guardian rule (Wave 3b hard-fail).
